description: Phase 2 offline warm-cache simulation. Separates measured offline token counts from provider economic projections. No generation API was called.

token_counting.reason: Offline deterministic simulation avoids provider token-count endpoints and generation APIs.

economic_projection.reason: OpenAI cached-input pricing is model-specific; do not encode a universal multiplier.
